description.en: Create a subscriber import from a CSV string. The import starts in draft status — call start-subscriber-import to begin processing.
description.de: Einen Abonnenten-Import aus einem CSV-String erstellen. Der Import startet im Entwurfsstatus — starte den Import mit start-subscriber-import.
description.es: Create a subscriber import from a CSV string. The import starts in draft status — call start-subscriber-import to begin processing.
description.fr: Create a subscriber import from a CSV string. The import starts in draft status — call start-subscriber-import to begin processing.
description.ro: Create a subscriber import from a CSV string. The import starts in draft status — call start-subscriber-import to begin processing.
description.it: Create a subscriber import from a CSV string. The import starts in draft status — call start-subscriber-import to begin processing.

description.en: The UUID of the email list to import subscribers into.
description.es: The UUID of the email list to import subscribers into.
description.fr: The UUID of the email list to import subscribers into.
description.ro: The UUID of the email list to import subscribers into.
description.it: The UUID of the email list to import subscribers into.

description.en: CSV data with at minimum an email column. First row must be headers.
description.es: CSV data with at minimum an email column. First row must be headers.
description.fr: CSV data with at minimum an email column. First row must be headers.
description.ro: CSV data with at minimum an email column. First row must be headers.
description.it: CSV data with at minimum an email column. First row must be headers.

description.en: If true, previously unsubscribed subscribers will be re-subscribed.
description.es: If true, previously unsubscribed subscribers will be re-subscribed.
description.fr: If true, previously unsubscribed subscribers will be re-subscribed.
description.ro: If true, previously unsubscribed subscribers will be re-subscribed.
description.it: If true, previously unsubscribed subscribers will be re-subscribed.

description.en: If true, subscribers not in the CSV will be unsubscribed.
description.es: If true, subscribers not in the CSV will be unsubscribed.
description.fr: If true, subscribers not in the CSV will be unsubscribed.
description.ro: If true, subscribers not in the CSV will be unsubscribed.
description.it: If true, subscribers not in the CSV will be unsubscribed.

description.en: If true, existing tags will be replaced. If false, CSV tags are appended.
description.es: If true, existing tags will be replaced. If false, CSV tags are appended.
description.fr: If true, existing tags will be replaced. If false, CSV tags are appended.
description.ro: If true, existing tags will be replaced. If false, CSV tags are appended.
description.it: If true, existing tags will be replaced. If false, CSV tags are appended.

success.en: Subscriber import created with status '{{STATUS}}'. UUID: {{IMPORT_UUID}}
success.es: Subscriber import created with status '{{STATUS}}'. UUID: {{IMPORT_UUID}}
success.fr: Subscriber import created with status '{{STATUS}}'. UUID: {{IMPORT_UUID}}
success.ro: Subscriber import created with status '{{STATUS}}'. UUID: {{IMPORT_UUID}}
success.it: Subscriber import created with status '{{STATUS}}'. UUID: {{IMPORT_UUID}}
